heading: How It Works
description: Discover your true earning potential in three simple steps.

1.heading: Enter Your Position
1.body: Provide your job title, state or city, and current base pay. Our smart autocomplete will match you to federal occupational classifications for maximum accuracy.

2.heading: We Analyze the Market
2.body: We instantly query our database of over 140,000 real-time compensation benchmarks, blending federal statistics (BLS) with active job board listings.

3.heading: Review Your Compensation
3.body: Immediately see if you are underpaid, compensated fairly, or leading the pack. We will even provide you with a custom email template to help negotiate a raise.
